notes: Equations captured from PDF text layer via heuristics numbered (n) tails and math-token lines; LaTeX field is a lossy reconstruction.

presentation.latex: candidate answer ai as: h = relu([q; ai; q⊙ ai; q− ai]W1 + b1), where ’;’ denotes concatenation and ⊙ is element-wise product. Then, the model pre- dicts an answer score using a feed forward layer: hW2 + b2. Average pre-trained embeddings and softmax are used to train the model.
